name: @hwai/playwright-trace-mcp
description: Local-first Playwright trace MCP for compact browser-debug evidence before frontier reasoning

scripts.benchmark:agent-trace: npm run build && node ../../scripts/hwai-ensure-service-deps.mjs services/agent-trace-mcp && npm --prefix ../agent-trace-mcp run build && node ../../scripts/hwai-playwright-agent-trace-proof.mjs
scripts.benchmark:vision: npm run build && node ../../scripts/hwai-ensure-service-deps.mjs services/vision-mcp && npm --prefix ../vision-mcp run build && node ../../scripts/hwai-playwright-vision-proof.mjs

author: Humanswith.ai
